INCORRECT BOLT PATTERN: Batch shows 6x139.7 for '2WD' S10 but this is WRONG. The Chevrolet S10 (all variants) used 5x120.65 (5x4.75") bolt pattern from 1982-2004. 6x139.7 was used by full-size trucks (C/K series), not S10. Hub bore 78.1 is also incorrect - S10 uses 70.3mm.
INCORRECT BOLT PATTERN: Batch shows 6x139.7 for '2WD' S10 but S10 used 5x120.65 (5x4.75"). 6x139.7 was for full-size trucks. Hub bore should be 70.3mm not 78.1mm.

INCORRECT BOLT PATTERN: Batch shows 6x139.7 for '2WD' S10 but S10 used 5x120.65 (5x4.75"). Hub bore should be 70.3mm not 78.1mm.

INCORRECT BOLT PATTERN: Batch shows 6x139.7 for '2WD' S10 Blazer but this is WRONG. S10 Blazer used 5x120.65 (5x4.75") bolt pattern, same as S10 pickup. 6x139.7 was for full-size K-Blazer/Suburban. Hub bore should be 70.3mm not 78.1mm. Tire size P215/75R15 and P235/75R15 are correct for 4wd variant per tiresize.com.

INCORRECT BOLT PATTERN: Batch shows 6x139.7 for '2WD' S10 Blazer but S10 Blazer used 5x120.65 (5x4.75"). Hub bore should be 70.3mm not 78.1mm. Tire sizes P215/75R15 and P235/75R15 are correct per tiresize.com.

INCORRECT BOLT PATTERN: Batch shows 6x139.7 for '2WD' S10 Blazer but S10 Blazer used 5x120.65 (5x4.75"). Hub bore should be 70.3mm not 78.1mm. Tire sizes P215/75R15 and P235/75R15 are correct per tiresize.com.
Wrong bolt pattern (6x139.7 listed, should be 5x120.65), wrong hub bore (78.1 listed, should be 70.3mm). S10 Blazer used 5-lug pattern for all years (1983-1994) regardless of 2WD/4WD.

2009 Chevrolet Caprice was NOT available in the US market. The Caprice PPV (Police Patrol Vehicle) was not introduced to the US until Fall 2010 as a 2011 model year. 2009 Caprices were only sold in the Middle East (Saudi Arabia, UAE). This entry should be REMOVED from US fitment database.
